headline: Penumbra, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: ALAMEDA, Calif., May 6, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Penumbra, Inc. , the world's leading thrombectomy company, today reported financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026. ...
